description_long: This is a round, white ceramic plate featuring a serving of tandoori chicken drumsticks, garnished with green herbs. The plate also contains a few slices of raw onion and a wedge of lemon, adding visual contrast and freshness to the presentation. The chicken is richly colored with a deep reddish-orange hue, indicating a spicy marinade, and appears slightly charred in places, suggesting it was cooked in a tandoor or oven. The plate itself is smooth, with a subtle rim and a clean, glossy finish. The food items are arranged in a way that highlights the main dish, with garnishes placed to one side. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a restaurant or home dining setting.
description: A white ceramic plate with tandoori chicken drumsticks, onion slices, and a lemon wedge, arranged for serving. The plate is smooth and glossy, with vibrant food colors.
description_view_0: The plate is seen with two chicken drumsticks, onion slices, and a lemon wedge clearly visible on the left side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the lemon wedge at the front, with the chicken drumsticks stacked and onion slices partially visible behind.
description_view_2: The chicken drumsticks are stacked vertically, with the lemon wedge on the left and less of the onion visible.
description_view_3: The plate shows two chicken drumsticks in the foreground, with onion slices on the right and the lemon wedge less visible.
attribute_surrounding_context: The plate is shown on a plain, neutral surface with no other visible context.
